missingRequirements: Input validation for numeric values and operator sequences
Error handling for division by zero
Error handling for invalid input sequences
UI component structure and layout requirements
Accessibility requirements (ARIA labels, screen reader support)
suggestedAdditions: Support for keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Esc for clear, Enter for equals)
confirmedRequirements: Basic arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division)
riskAreas: No backend or database - limits future extensibility
No authentication - may need for future features
Client-side only - potential security and data persistence limitations
No error handling specified - division by zero and invalid inputs will cause issues
No accessibility considerations - may fail WCAG compliance
No testing strategy - quality assurance not addressed
No deployment strategy - hosting and CI/CD not specified
No state management approach - could lead to complex bugs
No input validation - potential for unexpected behavior
